text.tspan: 🧰 A full network engineer's CLI toolkit
ping ICMP ping sweep — single host or subnet scan.
scan Port scanner — TCP connect, SYN, and UDP scanning.
service Service & banner detection — grab banners from open ports.
trace Traceroute — trace the path to a network host.
dns DNS toolkit — lookups, reverse DNS, zone transfers.
whois Whois lookup — domain & IP registration information.
http HTTP probe — check web server status, headers, and TLS.
subnet Subnet calculator — calculate subnet details and scan for live hosts.
capture Packet capture — live capture with BPF filter.
interfaces Network interfaces — show local interface information.
local Local ports scanner — show all open/listening ports on this machine.
speed Network speed test — measure download and upload speeds.
down Down detector — check if websites/services are up or down.
iftop Network traffic monitor — live bandwidth per connection (iftop-style).
